message_body_markdown:
Gunluk Degerleme Radari | 2026-06-30 | Taslak

Kapsam: 1 kurum raporu, 42 gecerli satir, 0 manuel kontrol kaydi.

Bugun kontrol edilen kaynaklar
- OYAK Yatirim | Nerede: https://www.oyakyatirim.com.tr/arastirma-raporlari | Ne kontrol edilir: Latest valuation table PDF | Siklik: per release
- KAP | Nerede: https://kap.org.tr/en | Ne kontrol edilir: Material events, financial statements, corporate actions | Siklik: intraday
- Borsa Istanbul | Nerede: https://www.borsaistanbul.com/en/markets/equity-market | Ne kontrol edilir: Equity market, sector flow and daily bulletin | Siklik: intraday
- TCMB | Nerede: https://www.tcmb.gov.tr/wps/wcm/connect/EN/TCMB%2BEN/Main%2BMenu/Statistics | Ne kontrol edilir: Data release calendar, rates, exchange rates and markets data | Siklik: daily
- TUIK | Nerede: https://veriportali.tuik.gov.tr/en | Ne kontrol edilir: Inflation, industrial production and confidence releases | Siklik: calendar-driven

Piyasa baglami
- Consensus expectations | Neden onemli: Prices embed expectations, so the report should show whether the narrative is optimistic or pessimistic. | Kontrol yeri: Research tabs, broker revisions and market prices
- Macro rates and FX | Neden onemli: Valuation multiples and risk appetite are sensitive to policy rate and TRY moves. | Kontrol yeri: TCMB statistics and exchange-rate pages
- Sector rotation and liquidity | Neden onemli: Top names move differently from thin names; liquidity and float should affect ranking. | Kontrol yeri: Borsa Istanbul equity market and indices pages
- Corporate events | Neden onemli: KAP disclosures can invalidate a target-price assumption very quickly. | Kontrol yeri: KAP material event disclosures

One cikan izleme adaylari
- ALBRK | 1 kurum | Ort. hedef: 13.85 TL | Kurum raporlarina gore one cikan | Skor: 100 | Risk: MANUAL_CONTROL | Kaynak tarihi: 2026-06-30
- ISMEN | 1 kurum | Ort. hedef: 71.4 TL | Kurum raporlarina gore one cikan | Skor: 100 | Risk: MANUAL_CONTROL | Kaynak tarihi: 2026-06-30
- PGSUS | 1 kurum | Ort. hedef: 342.0 TL | Kurum raporlarina gore one cikan | Skor: 100 | Risk: MANUAL_CONTROL | Kaynak tarihi: 2026-06-30
- HTTBT | 1 kurum | Ort. hedef: 68.64 TL | Kurum raporlarina gore one cikan | Skor: 100 | Risk: MANUAL_CONTROL | Kaynak tarihi: 2026-06-30
- GLRMK | 1 kurum | Ort. hedef: 326.4 TL | Kurum raporlarina gore one cikan | Skor: 100 | Risk: MANUAL_CONTROL | Kaynak tarihi: 2026-06-30

Anomali / ayrisma uyarilari
- ALBRK icin tek kurumdan gelen %71 pozitif ayrisma, manuel kontrol gerekir.
- ISMEN icin tek kurumdan gelen %98 pozitif ayrisma, manuel kontrol gerekir.
- PGSUS icin tek kurumdan gelen %95 pozitif ayrisma, manuel kontrol gerekir.
- HTTBT icin tek kurumdan gelen %75 pozitif ayrisma, manuel kontrol gerekir.
- GLRMK icin tek kurumdan gelen %90 pozitif ayrisma, manuel kontrol gerekir.

Revizyon momentumu
- Dikkat gerektiren yeni revizyon serisi yok.

Manuel kontrol gerektirenler
- Manuel kontrol kuyrugunda acik kritik kayit yok.

Bugun atilacak aksiyonlar
- Implement consensus engine output so the report can compare current price, average target and median target.
- Add broker count filter so single-broker names are visually separated from consensus names.
- Keep manual approval on until KAP, macro and consensus checks are wired into the pipeline.

Bu icerik yatirim tavsiyesi degildir. Otomatik veri analizi ve genel piyasa taramasidir. Nihai karar kullaniciya aittir.
approval_notes: primary=PENDING:Report is structurally coherent, includes disclaimer, and identifies single-broker anomalies requiring manual review. However, it lacks consensus engine output, broker count filtering, and integration of KAP/macro checks, making it unsuitable for fully automated publication.

secondary=PENDING:Report is internally coherent, includes a disclaimer, and identifies single-broker anomalies requiring manual review. However, it lacks consensus engine output, broker count filtering, and automated KAP/macro checks, making it unsuitable for public automation in its current form.

primary_review.summary: Report is structurally coherent, includes disclaimer, and identifies single-broker anomalies requiring manual review. However, it lacks consensus engine output, broker count filtering, and integration of KAP/macro checks, making it unsuitable for fully automated publication.
reasons: Anomalies correctly flagged for single-broker names.
No contradictory signals within the data.
Missing consensus engine output (current price vs. target comparison).
No broker count filter to visually separate single-broker names.
Manual approval still required; KAP, macro, and consensus checks not yet automated.
risks: Single-broker targets may mislead if presented without context.
Lack of current price comparison could cause misinterpretation of target prices.
No automated KAP event check may allow stale or invalidated targets.
Macro and FX sensitivity not reflected in the ranking.

secondary_review.summary: Report is internally coherent, includes a disclaimer, and identifies single-broker anomalies requiring manual review. However, it lacks consensus engine output, broker count filtering, and automated KAP/macro checks, making it unsuitable for public automation in its current form.
reasons: Disclaimer present and data internally consistent.
Anomalies and manual control flags are clearly documented.
Source snapshot and market context are well-defined.
Missing consensus engine output and broker count filter as noted in next actions.
No automated KAP, macro, or consensus checks wired into pipeline.
risks: Single-broker names may mislead users without visual separation from consensus names.
Lack of automated KAP checks could allow stale or invalid target prices.
No median target or current price comparison reduces analytical depth.
Manual approval required until pipeline is fully automated.
